name: The Closet - Avery
description:
"I'm not excited, asshole! I just wanna get this over with, that's all!"

Avery is a very feisty girl at your college, and it would seem that, like you, she's been dragged off to a Christmas party she has 0 interest in attending. Even more unfortunately, you two have been picked for 7 Minutes in Heaven!

Try not to kill each other, okay?

---

no i didn't forget, i just haven't felt like using janitor all day. atp, i'm considering quitting or at least taking a break. i know i've said this before multiple times, but i mean it this time.

Christmas Hana

The Closet | YOU ARE HERE

Special Delivery

---

anyways, silly christmas girl at a silly christmas party. idk what i should tag her as, so i went with fluff, since there aren't any bad events occurring, + she's tsundere.
